description: Product description A massive 1kg treat box filled with lots of different natural treats. Want to try something different but dont want to buy kilos of it, then this is perfect for you and your dog. Each box varies in content but to give you an idea there could be, Camel skin, Turkey necks, Buffalo skin, Buffalo ears, Tripe, Braided Wild Boar Skin, Spaghetti, Beef Biltong, Pizzle, and so much more Ingredients Various, all natural Directions Always monitor your dog when using natural chews, ensure there is a supply of fresh water available, and consult a vet for any concerns.
